instruction: Write a email to your professor to ask for an extention on a project due in two days. The phrase "I sincerely apologize" must appear exactly once. The phrase "I sincerely apologize" must appear exactly twice.
response:
Subject: Urgent: Extension Request for Project Due in Two Days

Dear Professor [Last Name],

I am writing to respectfully request a short extension on the project currently due in two days. Due to an unexpected personal emergency, I am unable to complete the work by the original deadline.

I sincerely apologize for this inconvenience.

I sincerely apologize again for the disruption this causes to your schedule.

I am committed to submitting the best possible work as soon as possible. Thank you for your time and understanding.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Student ID]
